passive.name: A Free Knight's Tarantella
passive.description: Max HP is increased by 12%/15%/18%/21%/24%. 15/15/15/15/15s after casting Intro Skill or Basic Attacks, ignore 8%/10%/12%/14%/16% of the target's DEF when dealing damage. If the target has at least 1 stack of Aero Erosion, the DMG taken by the target is Amplified by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%.
